rationale: alerts-destinations-prebuilt.spec.js thoroughly covers the destination-side prebuilt guards (type selector, CRUD, validation, edit). alerts-ui-operations.spec.js has basic template create/delete but no prebuilt-template guards. The template-side gaps — tab filtering (All/Prebuilt/Custom), prebuilt badge rendering, delete-button disabled state, bulk-delete prebuilt exclusion, clone, and edit — are not covered by any existing spec. This new spec ('alerts-template-prebuilt-guard') fills that gap while avoiding duplication with the destination tests.
